title: rubus clavaudii
intro: Rubus clavaudii, also known as the French black raspberry, is a rare and endangered species of raspberry native to the French Alps. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its high concentration of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and anthocyanins, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activity. The health benefits of Rubus clavaudii are numerous, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, with the tea being a popular remedy for digestive issues and the tincture being used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
